# Subumbra

Subumbra is an open-source split-trust API key broker and proxy for self-hosted AI apps and provider integrations.

Primary website:
- https://subumbra.dev/

Core public pages:
- https://subumbra.dev/
- https://subumbra.dev/privacy.html
- https://subumbra.dev/terms.html

Source and documentation:
- https://github.com/polysemic/Subumbra

Summary:
- Protects provider API keys by keeping apps away from raw upstream secrets
- Uses a Cloudflare Worker plus local services for split-trust mediation
- Designed for self-hosters and early alpha testers

Important notes:
- Alpha software; interfaces and docs may change
- Website content is informational and high-level
- Canonical technical detail lives in the GitHub repository and docs
